import sys
import threading

def main():
    import sys
    sys.setrecursionlimit(1 << 25)
    N, M = map(int, sys.stdin.readline().split())
    p = list(map(int, sys.stdin.readline().split()))
    insurances = []
    for _ in range(M):
        x, y = map(int, sys.stdin.readline().split())
        insurances.append((x, y))

    # Build the tree
    tree = [[] for _ in range(N + 1)]
    for i in range(2, N + 1):
        tree[p[i - 2]].append(i)

    # For each node, track the maximum coverage depth from any insurance
    max_depth = [0] * (N + 1)

    for x, y in insurances:
        # Propagate the insurance coverage to the node and its descendants
        stack = [(x, y)]
        while stack:
            node, depth = stack.pop()
            if depth > max_depth[node]:
                max_depth[node] = depth
                for child in tree[node]:
                    stack.append((child, depth - 1))

    # Count how many nodes have at least one insurance coverage
    count = sum(1 for i in range(1, N + 1) if max_depth[i] > 0)
    print(count)

threading.Thread(target=main).start()
